title: JumpAnimation
description: Adds a jumping animation and some cool mechanics
body:
Almost every animation modset out there changes everything except the one thing we do the most, the jumping animation for the player.

So here it is.

walking:

![walking](https://i.imgur.com/F7P2sr0.gif)


Idle:

![idle](https://i.imgur.com/S8EJoPq.gif)

Sprinting:

![sprinting](https://i.imgur.com/2emr3Sn.gif)


## **But the mod don't stop here!**

Falling:

Falling and taking damage will slow you down a little bit:
![falling](https://i.imgur.com/XhbEJlm.gif)


Falling from too high will slow you down even more:
![falling high](https://i.imgur.com/Med4xjc.gif)


Falling on hay bale negates all fall damage but you'll be unable to move for a short time:
![hay bale](https://i.imgur.com/gtSz4TL.gif)

Diving:

Diving can be performed by pressing space right after the jump animation, diving can be used to negate high falls speed penalty.

If you hit the ground you will roll:

![diving](https://i.imgur.com/HNh2aSX.gif)

 
If you hit water you will swim up:
![swim up](https://i.imgur.com/1r8yCfo.gif)



Cannonball:

To perform the cannonball you need to fall at least 5 blocks (that's when the player starts the falling animation) just press space once (while falling) and you'll perform the cannonball pose.
![cannonball](https://i.imgur.com/H3pEGHt.gif)



There's particularly no use for the cannonball, but damn it's fun to do it.

I highly recommend you to use this mod with a first person mod like real camera mod, or a third person mod like Betther Third Person mod.

This mod needs Player Animator 1.0.2.

## **And please don't forget to check out my other mods**
